name: custom_fields
description: Manage custom fields — create a new custom field on a board, add option to custom field dropdown, update a custom field definition. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: idModel
parameters.description: The ID of the model for which the Custom Field is being defined. This should always be the ID of a board.

parameters.name: modelType
parameters.description: The type of model that the Custom Field is being defined on. This should always be `board`.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the Custom Field

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of Custom Field to create.

parameters.name: display_cardFront
parameters.description: Whether this Custom Field should be shown on the front of Cards
